nodes.name: 古纳亚拉原住民区
nodes.summary: 古纳亚拉原住民区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Moustached antwren、Yellow-throated chlorospingus、Black-headed brushfinch，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Yellow-throated chlorospingus
nodes.summary: Yellow-throated chlorospingus（Yellow-throated chlorospingus，学名 Chlorospingus flavigularis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联15个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in Panama from Bocas del Toro Province to Coclé Province and separately in western Guna Yala (formerly called San Blas Province). It also apparently is found on Cerro Tacarcuna in extreme northwestern Colombia on the Panama border.Renjifo, L

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the far northern end of Colombia's Western Andes, on both slopes of the Central Andes in Antioquia Department, and on the eastern slope of the Eastern Andes from Boyacá Department south. Its range continues south on the eastern Andean slope through Ecuador and intermittently in Peru to Puno Department.{{cite book | last =Schulenberg | first =T.S

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Bulletin of the British Ornithologists’ Club 132(3): 140–160. The yellow-throated chlorospingus inhabits montane and lowland evergreen forest and secondary forest in the tropical and lower subtropical zones. In most areas it tends to favor the forest understory and its edges.{{cite book | last =Ridgely | first =Robert S

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "The lower-elevation slopes where this species occurs, in many areas, face the greatest pressure from human colonization and deforestation, although there appears to be considerable intact habitat that is reasonably secure in at least the short term."
